mapper.sql: id, article_id, column_id, sort_order, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select: select from article_column where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name, ac.sort_order FROM article_column ac LEFT JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE ac.column_id = #{columnId} AND ac.deleted = 0 AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ac.sort_order ${sortBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_column ac LEFT JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id WHERE ac.column_id = #{columnId} AND ac.deleted = 0 AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name, ac.sort_order FROM article_column ac LEFT JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE ac.column_id = #{columnId} AND ac.deleted = 0 AND a.deleted = 0 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_column ac LEFT JOIN article a ON ac.article_id = a.id WHERE ac.column_id = #{columnId} AND ac.deleted = 0 AND a.deleted = 0 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select from article_column where article_id = #{articleId} and deleted = 0
select from article_column where article_id = #{articleId} and column_id = #{columnId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_column (id, article_id, column_id, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{columnId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) FROM article_column WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE article_column SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article_column SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
UPDATE article_column SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE column_id = #{columnId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_column WHERE column_id = #{columnId} AND deleted = 0
